task_completion.description: Open the 'Blobs (25K)' sample image in ImageJ
task_completion.visual_evidence: An ImageJ image window titled 'blobs.gif' or 'Blobs (25K)' displaying a black and white image of irregular blob shapes.

task_completion.description: Configure ImageJ to measure Area, Circularity, and Feret's Diameter
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Set Measurements' dialog box is open with the checkboxes for 'Area', 'Shape descriptors' (which includes Circularity), and 'Feret's diameter' selected.

task_completion.description: Configure the Analyze Particles tool with the correct size, edge exclusion, and outline display
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Analyze Particles' dialog box is visible with 'Size' set to '10-Infinity', 'Exclude on edges' checked, and 'Show' set to 'Outlines' (or similar option to generate numbered outlines).

task_completion.description: Generate a flattened RGB map with outlined and numbered particles
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new image window showing the blobs as outlines with numbers inside or next to them. There should be evidence that the image is RGB (e.g., 'RGB' in the window title bar, or the 'Image > Type > RGB Color' menu option being used).

task_completion.description: Save the particle measurements to particle_data.csv
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog for the Results table showing the file name 'particle_data.csv' and the path '~/ImageJ_Data/results/', or a terminal/file explorer showing this file exists in the correct directory.

task_completion.description: Save the labeled RGB map to labeled_map.png
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog for the generated map image showing the file name 'labeled_map.png' and the path '~/ImageJ_Data/results/', or a terminal/file explorer showing this file exists in the correct directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the ImageJ GUI to perform the analysis
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking through ImageJ menus (e.g., Analyze > Analyze Particles) and interacting with dialog boxes, rather than just running a pre-written script in the terminal.

integrity.description: The measurements were genuinely generated by ImageJ
integrity.visual_evidence: An ImageJ 'Results' window should be visible containing columns for Area, Feret, and Circ., matching the expected output, rather than the CSV being manually typed in a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent analyzed the actual 'Blobs (25K)' sample image
integrity.visual_evidence: The image being thresholded and analyzed must be the standard ImageJ blobs image (irregular dark shapes on a lighter background), not a blank or dummy image.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task uses ImageJ's 'Blobs (25K)' built-in sample image (256x254 pixels). Expected output paths are /home/ga/ImageJ_Data/results/labeled_map.png and /home/ga/ImageJ_Data/results/particle_data.csv. Note that ImageJ's Results Table CSV output uses 'Circ.' (with a period) for Circularity. The expected particle count is roughly between 40 and 65.
